description: Convert an OpenStreetMap extract of central Bologna into a simulation-ready SUMO network. Using the raw OpenStreetMap file bologna_center.osm in /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/osm_import/, generate a SUMO network file named bologna_center.net.xml in the same directory. The conversion must remove unnecessary geometry nodes, guess highway ramps and roundabouts, and remove isolated edges. The final network should use UTM map projection and have nearby junctions joined with a join distance of 15 meters.
